headline: IDEX Corporation Declares Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
summary: NORTHBROOK, Ill., June 17, 2026--IDEX Corp. (NYSE:IEX) announces a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.73 per common share, its 127th consecutive such payment.

raw.headline: IDEX Corporation Declares Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend

headline: ITT Expands Product Portfolio Through Aerospace Contacts Acquisition
summary: ITT is set to acquire Aerospace Contacts for about $31M, aiming to strengthen its supply chain, aerospace offerings and interconnect solutions portfolio.
